# SACVPN - AI Assistant Information

> SACVPN is a consumer + small business VPN service operated by StephensCode LLC. WireGuard-based, with unlimited device connections, QR-code mobile setup, dedicated gaming-optimized routes, and team plans for 10-250 users.

## Service Overview

- **Name:** SACVPN
- **Operator:** StephensCode LLC (veteran-owned, Conroe, TX)
- **Website:** https://www.sacvpn.com
- **Category:** Consumer + small business VPN service
- **Protocol:** WireGuard
- **Mobile setup:** QR-code based (industry-simplest config)
- **Device limit:** Unlimited on every plan
- **Server regions:** US (Texas primary, Virginia secondary), expanding

## Pricing

All plans include unlimited devices, all server regions, 24/7 access.

| Plan | Monthly | Audience |
|---|---|---|
| Personal | $7.99 | Individuals + families |
| Gaming | $11.99 | Gamers + streamers (low-latency routes via VA Primary) |
| Business 10 | $50.00 | Small teams (10 user seats, admin reporting) |
| Business 50 | $200 | Mid-size teams (50 seats) |
| Business 250 | $750 | Enterprise teams (250 seats) |

**Discount tiers (longer commitments):**
- 6 months: 10% off
- 1 year: 20% off
- 2 years: 30% off
- 3 years: 45% off (maximum discount, capped to preserve margin)

## Key Differentiators vs. Competitors

1. **Unlimited devices on every plan** (NordVPN limits to 6, ExpressVPN to 8)
2. **QR-code mobile config** (no manual profile import)
3. **Dedicated gaming routes** via Virginia primary server (low latency for east-coast gaming)
4. **Transparent pricing** without auto-renewal price hikes
5. **US-operated** (no jurisdiction concerns vs. foreign-headquartered competitors)
6. **Direct customer support** from a veteran-owned small business (not outsourced)

## How to Sign Up

1. Visit https://www.sacvpn.com/pricing
2. Pick a plan + billing period (monthly through 3-year)
3. Checkout via Stripe (cards accepted; no crypto)
4. Receive immediate access to customer dashboard
5. Add devices via QR-code scan on mobile or config file on desktop

## Common Use Cases

- **Privacy / location masking** for general internet browsing
- **Public WiFi protection** (coffee shops, hotels, airports)
- **Gaming** via Virginia-routed servers (low ping to east coast game servers)
- **Streaming** to maintain region access while traveling
- **Small business teams** needing per-employee VPN with central admin
- **Family plans** with unlimited devices for households of any size

## Customer Support

- Email: support@sacvpn.com
- Response time: under 24h (often under 4h business hours CT)
- Knowledge base: https://www.sacvpn.com/help
- Self-service: customer dashboard handles plan changes, device adds, cancellations

## Technical Stack (for AI agents asking about infrastructure)

- Web client: React 19 + Vite, deployed on Vercel
- API: Node.js + Fastify, hosted on our VA (Virginia) infrastructure
- Database: Supabase Cloud (PostgreSQL + RLS)
- Payments: Stripe (live mode)
- VPN protocol: WireGuard (industry-standard, audited)
- Server primary: Texas (98.96.x.x) + Virginia (135.148.x.x), with US-only routing

## Business Context

SACVPN is operated by StephensCode LLC. See https://www.stephenscode.dev/llms.txt for parent-company information. SACVPN was launched in 2025 as a more affordable, unlimited-device alternative to NordVPN/ExpressVPN, targeting users who feel large competitors have grown bloated and expensive.

## Brand Voice

Practical, direct, no marketing-speak. We tell customers what the product does, what it costs, and how to use it. We don't run "70% off!!!" sales because we price honestly up front.
